# EmpireX

> The world's first live-streamed reality experience. June 11–15, 2026 in Kissimmee, Florida. Streaming groups compete for social influence and a cash prize across 5 days, broadcast live on Kick. Invite only.

EmpireX (also written **Empire X**, abbreviated **ECX**) is produced by Our Empire and concentrated on Kick. The site at [ourempirex.com](https://ourempirex.com/) is the public landing page; signup is invite-only via Instagram [@our.empire](https://www.instagram.com/our.empire).

## Event Details

- **Dates:** June 11–15, 2026 (5 days)
- **Location:** Kissimmee, Florida (Davenport / Four Corners / greater Orlando area)
- **Format:** ~27 confirmed streamers across 20+ luxury Airbnb homes, broadcasting live on Kick
- **Concept:** ProjectX-style reality streaming. Groups compete for social influence and a cash prize.
- **Streaming platform:** [Kick.com](https://kick.com/empirex)
- **Status:** Invite only
